app.subtitle: World Cup 2026 collection
app.owner: Made and maintained by Strahinja Vujinovic.
app.storageNotice: Your data is currently saved locally on this device/browser. If you change phone or clear browser data, you may lose your collection.
language.label: Language
shareApp.label: Share app
shareApp.text: Track your FIFA World Cup 2026 sticker album with StickerMate.
account.title: Account
account.guestBody: Data is saved on this device.
account.localDataShort: Data is currently saved locally on this device.
account.guestSignedOut: You are not signed in. Data is saved locally only on this device.
account.guestRisk: If you change phone or clear browser data, you may lose your collection.
account.guestGooglePrompt: Sign in with Google to back up across devices
account.backupUnavailable: Online backup is temporarily unavailable. Your data is saved on this device.
account.syncSuccess: Cloud sync is up to date.
account.syncWarning: Online save failed. Your local copy is safe.
account.cloudNotReady: Cloud save is not ready yet. Your collection is safely saved locally on this device.
account.notConfigured: Online backup is not set up on this server yet.
account.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
account.googleAuthFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
account.cloudEmptyBody: No online backup exists yet. Tap below to upload your current collection.
account.mergeTitle: Local and online data were both found.
account.mergeBody: Choose which copy to keep. This choice is shown only once.
guide.dashboardBody: The dashboard shows album progress, owned stickers, missing stickers and duplicates.
guide.collectionBody: Use search, filters and + / - buttons to update sticker quantity. Quantity above 1 means duplicate.
guide.quickReviewBody: Left means Missing, right means Owned. Your progress is saved automatically.
guide.teamsBody: Open a team or album section to see owned, missing and duplicate stickers for that group.
guide.duplicatesBody: This page shows stickers you own more than once, which makes trade prep faster.
guide.tradesBody: Use trade QR tools to share only your missing stickers and duplicates, then find possible swaps.
guide.spendingBody: Spending is estimated automatically from your collection. Each pack costs 150 RSD and contains 7 stickers.
guide.tradeQrBody: Your QR shares only your missing stickers and duplicates. It does not include private settings or history.
guide.friendQrBody: Scan your friend's trade QR, paste their link, or upload a QR photo to import their list and see possible swaps.
guide.settingsBody: Change theme, review fixed pack assumptions, rerun onboarding, show help again or reset collection.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
recent.title: Recently added
teams.label: Teams
teams.title: Teams
teams.body: Browse all teams and album sections, with progress for each one.
teams.emptyBody: This search does not match any team or album section. Clear the search to return to the full team list.
collection.title: Collection
collection.body: Search, filter and update every sticker in your album.
search.label: Search stickers
filters.label: Sticker filters
view.label: View mode
empty.noStickersBody: This means the current search and filter combination has no results. Try a broader search, switch to All, or clear the search field.
empty.noDuplicatesBody: Duplicates appear when you have more than one copy of the same sticker.
empty.noSearchDuplicatesBody: Try a different search term or section filter.
empty.noRecentBody: Recently added stickers appear after you mark stickers as owned or save a New Entry. Use Fill to add your first stickers.
onboarding.title: StickerMate
onboarding.body: Track your FIFA World Cup 2026 collection. Keep owned stickers, missing stickers and duplicates tidy in seconds.
onboarding.quickReviewBody: Move quickly through the album. Left marks Missing, right marks Owned.
onboarding.manualSetupBody: Browse the app first and mark stickers manually later.
onboarding.reviewChoiceBody: You already have saved fill progress. Choose whether to continue where you stopped or restart from the first sticker.
onboarding.reviewRestartBody: Start the album review again from sticker 1.
onboarding.skipBody: Go straight to the app and set everything later.
duplicates.title: Duplicates
duplicates.body: Stickers you own more than once and can trade.
trades.title: Trades
trades.body: Find what you can trade and prepare a message for friends.
trades.emptyBody: The page is prepared for future wishlists, friend comparisons, and shareable duplicate lists.
trades.qrSectionBody: Share your trade list or scan a friend's QR to compare swaps.
trades.removeFriendBody: This removes the saved friend QR profile. Your collection stays unchanged.
trades.noFriendsBody: Import a friend's QR to compare missing stickers and duplicates.
trades.noMatchBody: This friend profile does not currently match your duplicates and missing stickers. Add more duplicates, update your collection, or import a newer friend QR.
trades.duplicatesPreviewSummary: Showing {shown} of {total} duplicates ready for trade.
trades.noDuplicatesBody: Duplicates appear when you have more than one copy of the same sticker.
trades.noMissingBody: Your album is complete for the tracked checklist. If this looks wrong, check quantities in Collection.
trades.safeApply: Do not trade away album copies
trades.noHistoryBody: Manual trades you save will appear here, including what you gave, what you received, and whether the trade changed your collection.
trades.codesError: Add at least one sticker to give or receive.
trades.giveError: {code} is not available as a duplicate.
friendDetail.noFriendMissing: Friend has no missing stickers listed.
friendDetail.noICanGive: Nothing to give right now based on your duplicates and their missing list.
friendDetail.noFriendCanGiveMe: Nothing for you right now based on your missing stickers and their duplicates.
friendDetail.notFoundBody: This friend profile is no longer saved. Import the QR again or pick another friend from Trades.
more.title: More
more.body: Useful tools for teams, trading, spending and app settings.
about.title: About
about.body: StickerMate is a simple collection tracker made for personal album organization.
about.unofficial: StickerMate is an unofficial fan-made collection tracker.
about.affiliation: StickerMate is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Panini, FIFA, LastSticker or World Cup 2026.
about.referenceUse: Sticker images and checklist data are used only for personal tracking and reference inside the app.
spending.title: Spending
spending.emptyBody: Add packs, album costs, or other purchases when you spend money on stickers.
spending.tradeNote: Trades are not counted as spending unless you manually add them as a spending entry.
spending.deleteConfirmBody: This removes only this spending entry. Your collection and trades stay unchanged.
spending.baseRsdNote: Internal base: {price} RSD per pack. English display converts at 1 EUR = 117 RSD.
fill.title: Fill
fill.body: Add or update stickers quickly from one clear place.
fill.quickBody: Review one sticker at a time with fast Missing / Owned actions.
fill.newEntryBody: Enter codes from stickers you just got.
fill.manualBody: Browse the list and update quantities manually.
entry.title: New Entry
entry.body: Paste sticker codes separated by spaces, commas or new lines.
entry.noValidCodes: Add at least one valid album sticker code.
entry.packSpending: How many packs did you open?
entry.packSpendingBody: Optional. {stickers} stickers per pack, {price} per pack.
tradeQr.title: My Trade QR
tradeQr.name: Your name
tradeQr.privacy: QR only shares your duplicates and missing stickers.
friendQr.title: Friend QR
friendQr.subtitle: Scan, upload, or paste a friend's trade QR.
friendQr.scanCameraHint: Point your camera at your friend's trade QR.
friendQr.cameraPermission: Allow camera access to scan QR.
friendQr.cameraUnavailable: Camera is not available. You can paste a link or upload a QR image.
friendQr.pastePlaceholder: Paste QR link or trade data here
friendQr.imageInvalid: We couldn't find a valid StickerMate QR in this image.
friendQr.invalid: That is not a valid StickerMate trade QR.
friendQr.existing: A friend with this name already exists.
settings.title: Settings
settings.body: Autosave is always on. Your collection stays on this device.
settings.defaultCurrencyBody: Spending is stored in RSD. Serbian shows RSD, while English shows EUR using 1 EUR = 117 RSD.
settings.packSettingsBody: Fixed pack calculation used for automatic spending estimates.
settings.dangerBody: Reset collection permanently removes saved sticker quantities on this device. Use onboarding again if you only want to revisit the setup guide.
settings.importReadError: That file could not be read.
settings.importInvalidError: That file is not a StickerMate export.
settings.importMissingQuantitiesError: The export is missing sticker quantities.
settings.onboardingConfirmBody: This will take you back to the initial setup guide. Your collection and entered stickers will not be deleted.
settings.resetConfirmBody: This will delete your entered quantities, duplicates, history and collection settings. This action cannot be easily undone.
settings.albumScopeNote: StickerMate tracks the 980 stickers needed to complete the standard album. Extra collector variants are excluded from the main album tracker.
help.title: Help
help.body: A short guide to StickerMate basics.
help.startBody: Start with Quick Album Fill if you are new, or use New Entry if you just opened packs.
help.entryBody: Use Fill, New Entry, or the + buttons. You can enter multiple codes separated by spaces, commas or new lines.
help.statusTitle: What do Missing / Owned / Duplicate mean?
help.statusBody: Missing means quantity 0, Owned means quantity 1, and Duplicate means quantity above 1.
help.reviewTitle: How does Quick Album Fill work?
help.reviewBody: Go through the album one sticker at a time. Choose Missing on the left or Owned on the right.
help.collectionBody: Collection shows all album stickers. Use search, filters and + / - buttons to quickly update quantity.
help.teamsBody: See progress by team and album section. Open a team to see owned, missing and duplicate stickers.
help.duplicatesBody: All stickers you own more than once appear there. This list is useful for trading.
help.spendingBody: Spending is estimated automatically from your collection. The app assumes 150 RSD per pack and 7 stickers per pack, counting every physical sticker you own.
help.tradesBody: See what you can give and what your friend can give you. You can copy a WhatsApp trade message.
help.qrBody: The QR code only shares your missing stickers and duplicates. A friend's QR helps find possible trades.
help.backupTitle: How do I save my data?
help.backupBody: Your data is stored on this device. Export a backup before changing phone or browser.
help.phoneBody: Export your collection on the old phone, then import that backup file on the new phone.
review.title: Quick Album Fill
review.shortcuts: ← Missing · →/Space Owned · D duplicate · Backspace back · S skip
review.restartConfirm: Restart album review from the beginning?
review.completedBody: You now have a clean starting pass through the standard album.
